quests.name: Canine Courtship
objectives: Explore the Lady and the Tramp Realm.
Tramp is here! Talk to him.

Search through garbage cans surrounded by debris as well as the alleys and streets to find supplies to make a more suitable outfit.
  ‧ 4 Old Stuffing.
  ‧ 4 Old Paper.
  ‧ 4 Fabric.

Use the Crafting Station in the back alley to make a suitable outfit:
  ‧ Tony's Shirt.
  ‧ Tony's Apron.

Dress up in your new outfit.
  ‧ Tony's Shirt.
  ‧ Tony's Apron.
Show Tramp your new outfit.
Open the gate to the right of Tony's to get behind the restaurant.
Follow Tramp to the place where he wants to re-enact his first date with Lady.
Talk to Lady about her first date with Tramp.

Prepare for Lady and Tramp's date.
  ‧ Cook Spaghetti Especialle using some of the Ingredients from the stall.
  ‧ Find a nice tablecloth for the table.
  ‧ Find some candles to set a romantic mood.
  ‧ Place the Spaghetti Especialle, Red and White Tablecloth, and Romantic Candles on the table.
Interact with the table to light the candles.
What a beautiful night! Take a picture of Lady and Tramp together as a souvenir.
Listen to Tramp and Lady.
Oh no, the dogcatcher caught Lady! Talk to Tramp.
Follow Tramp to the dog pound area.
Avoid the spotlights to reach the lever that turns them off.

Meet up with Tramp.
  ‧ Talk to Tramp.
Move the ladder so you can reach the window.
Use the ladder to enter the dog pound.

quests.name: Meatballs
objectives: Wear the Substitute Snout to sniff out trouble in the Lady and the Tramp Realm.
Follow the scent trail to the source of the storm.
Oops! The storm divided itself into many Spaghetti Tumbleweeds. Chase and eat them until you find the source of the storm.
Pick up the Well-Worn Dog Collar.
Make sure you have the Well-Worn Dog Collar in your Inventory.
Show the Well-Loved Dog Collar to Tramp.
Leave the Realm and return to Dreamlight Valley.
Place Lady and Tramp's House.
Use the Scrooge McDuck Sign to pay for the construction of Lady and Tramp's House.
Welcome Tramp! But where's Lady?
Tramp has arrived, but where's Lady? Check in with Tramp.
